title: Action Stuff Tools (batrider's Better Tools)
description: Vanilla like textures for Tools. From 1.0 Action And Stuff
body:
Action Tools Texture Pack Its a transfered Action And Stuff 1.0 Bedrock Addon textures to Java

This texture pack replaces vanilla Minecraft tools with high-energy, stylized weapons and gear from Action and Stuff. Features:

Custom textures for swords, pickaxes, axes, shovels, and hoes

Inspired by the Action and Stuff aesthetic: techy, vibrant, and powerful

Compatible with most Minecraft versions. Pair it with shaders for extra flair!

![All Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b858ef9e7e5ed2601d8e81d30ab68b1f01794993.png)
[Bedrock Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/action-and-stuff-tools-bedrock-edition)
